message:
test(bd-2j5.19): add 105 unit tests across 5 installer/CLI modules

Coverage matrix for bootstrap.rs (+40), uninstall.rs (+24),
from_source.rs (+11), integrations.rs (+16), wizard.rs (+14).
Tests cover edge cases in shell profile mutation, cleanup modes,
prerequisite probing, JSON injection, config generation, and
interactive wizard input handling. Total lib tests: 769.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
